title: Timeline of Delmara
description: A beginning chronology of Delmara, from the remembered age of Aurumveldor to the present Current Era.

eras.name: Aurumveldian Era
eras.summary: The age of Aurumveldor, before the Great Deluge remade Delmara.

events.name: Keepers Established
events.summary: The Keepers of Volelia are founded in the elder age of Delmara.

events.name: The Great Deluge
events.summary: The final great event of the Aurumveldian Era. The Ondris River becomes the Ondris Sea, and Dughfaldur is drowned beneath its waters.

eras.name: Current Era
eras.summary: The present age of Delmara after the flood and remaking of the old world.

events.name: Axont Established
events.summary: Axont rises in the Current Era.

events.name: Klad Settled
events.summary: The Klad establish their settlement north of Lake Imryll.
